Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 ii 

Tips on Navigating the Codebook 

This document is a detailed codebook that describes each variable in the Medicare-Medicaid Linked Enrollee Data 
Source (MMLEADS) research files. We have included several ways for users to quickly find the information they need: 

• A complete listing of all variables in the files, in alphabetical order based on their SAS variable names. 
• Individual entries for each variable contain a
